params.balancedPairInitCodeStorage_: address of the storage contract holding PartyPoolBalancedPair init code
params.mintImpl_: address of the Mint implementation contract to be used by all pools
params.owner_: Initial administrator who is allowed to create new pools and kill() old ones
params.poolInitCodeStorage_: address of the storage contract holding PartyPool init code
params.protocolFeeAddress_: recipient address for protocol fees for pools created by this planner (may be address(0))
params.protocolFeePpm_: protocol fee share (ppm) to be used for pools created by this planner
params.swapImpl_: address of the Swap implementation contract to be used by all pools
params.wrapper_: The WETH9 implementation address used for this chain

params.limit: Maximum number of items to return

returns.pools: Array of pool addresses for the requested page

params.limit: Maximum number of items to return

returns.tokens: Array of token addresses for the requested page

returns._0: bool True if the pool is supported, false otherwise

params.limit: Maximum number of items to return
params.token: The token address to query pools for

returns.pools: Array of pool addresses containing the specified token

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

returns._0: The total count of pools containing the token

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

returns._0: The total count of unique tokens

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

getAllPools(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves a page of pool addresses

getAllTokens(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves a page of token addresses

getPoolSupported(address).notice: Checks if a pool is supported

getPoolsByToken(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves a page of pool addresses for a specific token

mintImpl().notice: Address of the mint implementation contract used by all pools created by this factory

newPool(string,string,address[],int128,u.notice: Convenience overload: legacy single-fee signature — repeat the scalar for every asset and delegate.
Main newPool variant: accepts kappa directly (preferred) and a per-asset fee vector.

poolCount().notice: Returns the total number of pools created

poolsByTokenCount(address).notice: Returns the total number of pools for a specific token

protocolFeeAddress().notice: Address to receive protocol fees for pools created by this planner (may be address(0))

protocolFeePpm().notice: Protocol fee share (ppm) applied to fees collected by pools created by this planner

swapImpl().notice: Address of the swap implementation contract used by all pools created by this factory

tokenCount().notice: Returns the total number of unique tokens
